name: MoneyGram
description_short: Dallas MoneyGram on Lemmon Ave provides check-cashing and money transfer services daily from 7 AM to 11 PM.
description_long:
The MoneyGram branch at 4207 Lemmon Ave in Dallas, TX operates as a standalone check-cashing location serving the community 7 days a week. With hours running from 7 AM to 11 PM daily, this Dallas location provides extended access for residents and visitors needing financial services outside traditional banking hours.

This MoneyGram location specializes in check-cashing and money transfer services. Customers can contact the branch at +1 800-746-7287 for questions or to arrange transactions. The Dallas facility handles both domestic and international money transfers with efficient processing and competitive rates.

For Dallas residents needing quick access to check-cashing or money transfer services, the Lemmon Ave location is open evenings and weekends for convenience. Bring a valid government-issued ID and any required documentation for your specific transaction. MoneyGram provides a practical financial service option outside the traditional banking network.
pros: 80+ documented locations across Dallas area for high accessibility
Operates through trusted retail partners including major chains like CVS with extended hours (some open until 11:59 PM)
Dual-channel service model allowing both online and in-person money transfers
Multiple partner types (pharmacies, check cashing stores, grocery markets) provide varied access points
No requirement to visit specialty financial offices; can conduct transfers during regular retail shopping
Wide geographic coverage with searchable location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Established national brand with multi-decade operational history
cons: Website lacks transparent fee structure, exchange rates, or transfer limits information
Service quality and hours dependent on individual retail partner locations, creating inconsistency
No direct MoneyGram staff support at partner locations; relies on third-party retailer employees
Limited detail on transfer speed, delivery timeframes, or tracking capabilities
Fragmented partner network means potential service gaps in underserved Dallas neighborhoods
best_for: Customers seeking convenient money transfer access during standard retail shopping hours
Individuals without dedicated financial services offices nearby who prefer retail-embedded solutions
Senders and receivers needing flexible in-person transaction options without specialty bank visits
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best suited for consumers seeking accessible, conveniently-located money transfer services without visiting dedicated financial institutions. The primary caveat is that service quality, fees, and hours vary significantly by individual retail partner, and critical pricing and regulatory information is absent from their public-facing location content.
services: In-person transaction processing at partner retail locations
Location search and identification by address or ZIP code
meta_description: MoneyGram at 4207 Lemmon Ave, Dallas, TX. Check cashing and money transfers, open daily 7AM-11PM.
